feat.name: Feral Mending
feat.prerequisite: *Werecreature Dedication*; you were not afflicted with the curse of the werecreature
feat.requirement: Your previous action was to Change Shape.
feat.text: You can heal your wounds while reshaping your flesh. You regain 1d6 Hit Points for every 2 levels you have (minimum 1d6).

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Healing
traits.text: A healing effect restores a creature’s body, typically by restoring Hit Points, but sometimes by removing diseases or other debilitating effects.

traits.name: Primal
traits.text:
This magic comes from the primal tradition, connecting to the natural world and instinct. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to primal magic.
